title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group!
